chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No. 136 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of bail application. 09-03-2023 Syed Shafqat Hussain Shah, Advocate for applicants. Mr. Faheem Ahmed Panhwar, Addl.P.G. ============= Omar Sial, J: A young girl by the name of Deenar Karim and her fiancé were enjoying themselves at the Sea View when 2 men on a motorcycle came and on the show of pistols snatched their valuables. Deenar brought the incident to the notice of a nearby police party, which managed to chase and apprehend the 2 persons. The valuables snatched from the couple were recovered and returned to them. The entire episode that happened on 23.10.2022 was witnessed by Deenar. She was also present when the police asked the 2 muggers for their names. The 2 boys were the applicants Mohammad Bilal and Muhammad Asghar. 2. Mohammad Bilal applied for bail but his application was dismissed on 04.01.2023 by the learned 10th Additional Sessions Judge, Karachi South. 3. Learned counsel for the applicants argued that the case is a false case and that the Darakshan police station did not have jurisdiction. In response to what malafide the young lady had to implicate the applicants falsely, learned counsel was of the view that this is all she does as she goes from place to place entrapping people. Both arguments raised by the counsel have no substance whatsoever. 4. Upon a tentative assessment it appears that the applicants were apprehended red-handed on the spot soon after having committed the offence. Recovery of the stolen goods was also made on the spot. The applicants were identified on the spot by the complainant.

Recovery of the stolen goods was also made on the spot. The applicants were identified on the spot by the complainant. The complainant had absolutely no reason to falsely implicate the applicants. 5. Bail application stands dismissed. JUDGE
